hero.title: A better native SSH client for Apple devices
hero.subtitle: Connect to servers, keep them organized, browse remote files, and stay in sync with Keychain-secured credentials across your iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
hero.meta: Requires iOS 16+ or macOS 13+ (Apple Silicon). Free forever, or buy lifetime.

why.title: Why choose Waterm
why.subtitle: A focused terminal app for people who want native Apple UX, modern SSH options, and pricing that still makes sense for solo users.

native.title: Native on iPhone, iPad, and Mac
native.desc: One app designed specifically for Apple platforms, with interfaces that feel at home everywhere you use it.

modern.title: Modern SSH included
modern.desc: Use standard SSH, Mosh, Tailscale SSH, or Cloudflare Tunnel SSH without juggling separate tools.

sync.title: iCloud sync without pain
sync.desc: Keep server metadata in sync automatically while credentials stay protected in Keychain.

pricing.title: Fair pricing with lifetime
pricing.desc: Free forever for personal use, Pro unlocks scale, and lifetime is there if subscriptions are not your thing.

features.title: Built for faster, simpler remote work
features.subtitle: Waterm is built to make everyday remote work feel faster, simpler, and more native on Apple devices.

rendering.title: Fast, accurate terminal rendering
rendering.desc: Powered by libghostty for responsive drawing, correct terminal behavior, and a better feeling remote session.

connect.title: Connect your way
connect.desc: Standard SSH when you want it, modern transports when you need them, with less setup friction.

files.title: Built-in SFTP file browser
files.desc: Browse remote folders, upload and download files, create directories, and rename, move, or delete items without switching to a separate SFTP app.

preview.title: Preview and edit in place
preview.desc: Preview text, image, and video files inline, edit supported text files, and inspect metadata and POSIX permissions.

pickup.title: Pick up on any device
pickup.desc: Start on your Mac, reconnect from your phone, and keep your server list with you everywhere.

organize.title: Organize servers simply
organize.desc: Workspaces, environments, and multiple tabs keep solo infrastructure manageable without team-platform overhead.

useCases.title: Who it is for
useCases.subtitle: Made for people who manage real machines, but do not want a bloated control plane just to open a terminal.

solo.title: Solo devs
solo.desc: For side projects, client work, and small production stacks that need a clean SSH workflow.

homelab.title: Homelab users
homelab.desc: Check containers, update machines, and jump between services from the Apple devices you already use.

apple.title: Apple-first technical users
apple.desc: If you live on iPhone, iPad, and Mac, Waterm fits that environment instead of fighting it.

ai.title: Remote AI and server workflows
ai.desc: Check Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, remote agents, GPU boxes, inference hosts, and automation servers when you are away from your desk.

pricing.title: Free forever. Upgrade when you need more.
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when your setup grows, or buy lifetime and be done with it.

free.name: Free
features: SSH, Mosh, Tailscale SSH, and Cloudflare Tunnel SSH

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Unlock scale when you need more

lifetime.name: Lifetime
lifetime.description: Pay once and keep it simple
lifetime.guarantee: Refunds are handled by Apple through the App Store

q1.question: What is Waterm?
q1.answer: Waterm is an SSH terminal app for iOS and macOS. It lets you manage and connect to remote servers with iCloud sync across your Apple devices.

q2.question: How does iCloud sync work?
q2.answer: Server configurations sync via iCloud to all your devices. Passwords and SSH keys are stored in Apple Keychain and can sync via iCloud Keychain when enabled.

q3.question: Which connection methods are supported?
q3.answer: Waterm supports standard SSH plus Mosh, Tailscale SSH, and Cloudflare Tunnel SSH. Credentials stay secured in Apple Keychain when required.

q4.question: Does Waterm work on iPad?
q4.answer: Yes. Waterm works on iPhone, iPad, and Mac, and the iOS version includes a keyboard toolbar with Esc, Tab, Ctrl, and arrow keys.

q5.question: What terminal engine does it use?
q5.answer: Waterm uses libghostty, the same rendering engine from Ghostty, for fast and accurate terminal emulation.

q6.question: What is included in Free vs Pro?
q6.answer: Free includes 1 workspace, 3 servers, and 1 connection tab. Pro unlocks unlimited workspaces, servers, simultaneous connections, and custom environments.

q7.question: Can I use one purchase on multiple devices?
q7.answer: Yes. Your Pro purchase syncs through the App Store. Sign in with the same Apple ID on your devices to unlock Pro everywhere.

q8.question: What is the refund policy?
q8.answer: Refunds are handled by Apple through the App Store. To request one, use Apple's refund flow at reportaproblem.apple.com.

q9.question: What are the system requirements?
q9.answer: iOS 16+ on iPhone and iPad, or macOS 13+ Ventura on Apple Silicon Macs. Intel Macs are not supported.

q10.question: Does Waterm include remote file browsing?
q10.answer: Yes. Waterm includes a built-in SFTP Files view for browsing folders, previewing text, image, and video files, uploading and downloading, renaming or moving items, creating folders, and editing POSIX permissions on supported servers.

closing.title: Your servers. Anywhere.
closing.subtitle: Start free on iPhone, iPad, and Mac.

footer.tagline: Native SSH client for iPhone, iPad, and Mac
footer.description: Open source, free forever, with optional Pro and lifetime upgrade.
